_comment: Disposable per-day diary cache. Path: ~/DailyQuick/.dailyquick/diary/<YYYY-MM-DD>.json. Copy this to ~/DailyQuick/.dailyquick/diary/2026-07-20.json (rename to today) to preview the Diario panel. Produced for real by the /project-diary Claude Code step (Apple Mail via AppleScript + Slack via MCP, synthesized with AI). Keyed by project slug. Sensitive — kept out of the editable notes. Safe to delete.

duin.summary: Abelardo (cliente) pidió por email adelantar la demo de RevOps; Lide propuso en #duin revisar el pipeline antes del viernes.

events.text: pide adelantar la demo de RevOps al jueves
propone revisar el pipeline antes del viernes en #duin
